description_long: This SUV features a striking, angular design with a matte gray metallic exterior and a geometric, wedge-shaped profile reminiscent of the Tesla Cybertruck. The body is constructed from flat, planar surfaces with sharp edges, giving it a futuristic and armored appearance. The windows are large, darkly tinted, and seamlessly integrated into the body, with a continuous black strip running along the side. The wheels are oversized, rugged, and have a deep tread pattern, suggesting off-road capability. The front and rear lights are slim and horizontal, with the rear featuring a single red light bar. The rear cargo area is covered by a ribbed, metallic tonneau cover, emphasizing utility and security.
description: A futuristic, angular SUV with a matte gray metallic finish, large rugged wheels, and a covered rear cargo area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wedge-shaped profile, large black wheels, and ribbed rear cargo cover.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sharp, sloped hood, wide windshield, and slim horizontal headlights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the angular design and rugged wheels, with clear visibility of the geometric body lines.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the ribbed cargo cover, single red light bar, and the squared-off tailgate.
attribute_wheel_design: Large black wheels with deep, rugged tread and a multi-faceted, geometric hubcap design
